title: Bunnie Xo Reveals Her DMs Are Full of Thirsty Men Amid Jelly Roll Divorce: ‘Send Help’
body: Bunnie Xo ‘s DMs are apparently like the Wild West right now, with the influencer posting a video poking fun at all the thirsty men who’ve been hitting her up since her divorce from Jelly Roll went public. In the Tuesday (June 23) clip, Bunnie wears different face-morphing filters to make herself look like various men — with a diverse range of facial hair — while singing along to Petey Pablo’s highly explicit song “Freek-A-Leek,” on which he offers a list of NSFW suggestions for things to do in the bedroom. “What it’s like opening my DMs right now,” she wrote in text over the video. Related A Timeline of Jelly Roll & Bunnie Xo’s Relationship Bunnie Xo Tells Her Side of Jelly Roll Divorce & Says They’re Still Having a Baby: ‘We Are Having Our Little Nugget Together’ Jelly Roll’s Daughter Bailee Says She’s ‘Disgusted’ by Public Interest in His Divorce From Bunnie Xo “Send help,” the Dumb Blonde host added in the caption. The tongue-in-cheek post comes a little over a week after TMZ uncovered court documents revealing that Jelly had filed to d…

title: Google Wallet will let you know if you can sign up for Touchless ID with TSA PreCheck
summary: TSA PreCheck has been trying to speed travel times up with the addition of Touchless ID, which essentially allows passengers to walk through the enhanced security queue without stopping. Google Wallet is adding an option to opt in for Touchless ID through saved boarding passes.
